# SQLite (vendored amalgamation)

`sqlite3.c` / `sqlite3.h` are the SQLite **3.46.1** amalgamation from
<https://www.sqlite.org>, used by the SQLite reference driver
(`drivers/sqlite`).

SQLite is in the **public domain** (no license file ships with the
amalgamation; see <https://www.sqlite.org/copyright.html>), which is compatible
with the project's GPLv3. The amalgamation is checked in verbatim and is not
modified.
